memoryArtifacts.headline: Edel af Flandern
memoryArtifacts.description: Edel, Adela af Flandern, ca. 1064-1115, dansk dronning var en af de kvinder, som gennem ægteskab var udset til at styrke de politiske bånd mellem Middelalderens europæiske fyrstehuse. Edel var datter …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle de Flandre於1064年之後出生時，她的父親Robert Ier comte de Flandre8965歲，母親Gertrud Billung von Sachsen8965歲。她於1081年與Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen在丹麥結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1115年4月在義大利普格利亞，埋葬在義大利普格利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adèle de Flandre于1064年之后出生时，她的父亲Robert Ier comte de Flandre8965岁，母亲Gertrud Billung von Sachsen8965岁。她于1081年与Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen在丹麦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1115年4月在意大利普格利亞，埋葬在意大利普格利亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Flandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adèle de Flandre was born after 1064, her father, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, was 8965 and her mother, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, was 8965. She married Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen in 1081, in Denmark. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in April 1115, in Puglia, Italy, and was buried in Puglia, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle de Flandre est née après 1064, son père, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, avait 8965 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, avait 8965 ans. Elle a épousé Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen en 1081, à Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1115, à Puglia, Italie, et a été enterrée à Puglia, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle de Flandre nach 1064 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Ier comte de Flandre 8965 und ihre Mutter Gertrud Billung von Sachsen 8965. Sie hat 1081 in Dänemark Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1115 in Puglia, Italien und wurde in Puglia, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Flandre è nata il dopo il 1064, sua padre, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, aveva 8965 anni e sua madre, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, aveva 8965 anni. Lei sposato Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen nel 1081, nel Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1115, nel Puglia, Italia, e fu sepolta a Puglia, Italia.

ja.Kassel, Hessen, Fränkisches Reich: ドイツヘセンクレイス カセル
ja.Veurne, West Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンベウルン
ja.Salerno, Campania, Italy: イタリアカンプアニアサラーノ
ja.Roskilde, Denmark: デンマークロスキルド
ja.lifeSummary: Adèle de Flandreが1064年以後に生まれた時，父Robert Ier comte de Flandreは8965歳，母Gertrud Billung von Sachsenは8965歳であった。1081年にデンマークでKnud 'den Hellige' Svendsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1115年4月にイタリアプウグリアで死去し，イタリアプウグリアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle de Flandre(이)가 1064년 이후에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ier comte de Flandre(은)는 8965세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud Billung von Sachsen(은)는 8965세였다. 그녀는 1081년 덴마크에서 Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1115년 4월 이탈리아 푸그리야에서 사망했으며 이탈리아 푸그리야에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Flandre nasceu após 1064, seu pai, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, tinha 8965 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, tinha 8965 anos. Ela casou-se com Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen em 1081, em Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1115, em Puglia, Itália, e foi sepultada em Puglia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle de Flandre родилась после 1064 г., её отцу по имени Robert Ier comte de Flandre было 8965 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, 8965. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen в 1081 г. в местности Дания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1115 г. в местности пугля, Италия и была похоронена в местности пугля, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle de Flandre nació después de 1064, su papá, Robert Ier comte de Flandre, tenía 8965 años y su mamá, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, tenía 8965 años. Se casó con Knud 'den Hellige' Svendsen en 1081, en Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1115, en Puglia, Italia, y fue sepultada en Puglia, Italia.
